Model: poll topline + race & ideology crosstab calibration (2025 poll, n=697, MOE ±3.7pp). Win probabilities from Monte Carlo precinct sim (10k trials, ±8pp precinct uncertainty). Top-line numbers too early to be reliable — treat as illustrative spatial prior.
